svg.text: NetJump HUD - Real-time network + security console

g.text: Vulnerable driver loaded: rtcore64.sys (MSI Afterburner, CVE-2019-16098)
Fix: Uninstall MSI Afterburner or update to v4.6.5+
Outbound to 185.220.101.42 matched FireHOL Level 1 (chrome.exe pid 14288)
Fix: Block via firewall (right-click → Block remote IP)
SMBv1 client is enabled — superseded by SMB 3.x, exploit vector for EternalBlue
Fix: Swap Cat5e/6 cable or try different switch port
DoH detected: telemetry.example.com:443 via non-browser process
Fix: Inspect process tree, block if unexpected
Periodic connection: msedge.exe → 13.107.42.14:443 every 180.2 s (±2.1 s)
Pattern match: MS telemetry interval (low risk)
Real-time protection ON, signatures 0d old, no quarantined items
Hosts file clean (no tampering, no proxy hijack, no ad-block surprises)
DNS · FLOWS · TRAFC · PROCS · PERSI · SYSTM
